forbidden_word_findings.reason: The exported frontier contains finite all-1 debt words that survive to the quotient cap. A valid lemma must use additional congruence/formula data beyond the 0/1 frontier word and h/t ratio.

candidate_recurrence.delta_rule: Delta' = Delta + 1 for 0, Delta' = Delta + 1 - log2(3) for 1
candidate_recurrence.candidate_invariant: Long one-heavy frontier words must create residue constraints that force a zero-rich repayment block. This is not yet certified; the next proof must derive the repayment block from congruences, not from caps.

candidate_integer_invariant.needed_bound: prove h <= floor((t + Delta0 - epsilon)/log2(3)) after a bounded repayment block
candidate_integer_invariant.structural_target: derive a congruence-forced zero-rich block from long one-heavy words

candidate_congruence_lemma.failed_candidate: There is a universal max h or max consecutive 1s before repayment.
candidate_congruence_lemma.counter_observation: Finite all-1 frontier debt words occur up to the current cap.
candidate_congruence_lemma.next_viable_form: Track the affine numerator b and denominator gap 2^c-3^o, or an exact residue interval, in addition to the frontier word. The word alone does not force repayment.

what_remains_open: Report-only mode analyzes the open keys exported by the quotient report.
Need a congruence lemma forcing repayment after long one-heavy prefixes.
Need exact B certification for every resulting positive return.
